subcodes.first_line: The ungodly have expelled Us from the City of Mystery and cast Us into the fortress of 'Akká, wherein the Beauty lies imprisoned [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اخرجونا المشرکون من مدینه السر و ادخلونا فی حصن العکا و فیه حبس جمال
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power of the Manifestation of God, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @suffering and imprisonment
